import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        if not have
          best = v
          have = true
        else if v > best
          best = v
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    println("max=#{best}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
